items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive sections that can be expanded or collapsed.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A date field component that allows users to select a date from a calendar.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer sections.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: A chart component built on top of Recharts.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: A command palette with search and keyboard navigation.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on the primary window, interrupting the user with important content.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user with a list of options.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: A component for displaying empty states.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Displays a form input field or a component that looks like an input field.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: A group of input-related components with addons.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom styling.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: A visual divider between content.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A panel that slides in from the side of the screen.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Used to display a loading state while awaiting content.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: A toast notification component.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that toggles between on and off states.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A responsive table component with styled rows and cells.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content known as tab panels.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea or a component that looks like a textarea.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element on hover or focus.
